scripts.run:auth: wait-on http-get://localhost:5178/account/login && cypress run --spec e2e/auth-critical-flow.cy.ts --config baseUrl=http://localhost:5178
scripts.run:auth:headed: wait-on http-get://localhost:5178/account/login && cypress run --headed --spec e2e/auth-critical-flow.cy.ts --config baseUrl=http://localhost:5178
scripts.run:auth:ci: wait-on http-get://backend:5178/account/login && cypress run --spec e2e/auth-critical-flow.cy.ts --config baseUrl=http://backend:5178
